# savetokens.tips

> Token-saving techniques for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex). Measured figures come from per-command raw-versus-filtered token deltas logged by the RTK proxy: 82.1% typical reduction across 93,611 real commands, snapshot 2026-07-19. Estimates carry no before-and-after log and are marked with a tilde.

## Pages

- [Measurements](https://savetokens.tips/): all techniques with measured versus estimated figures, per-command savings, FAQ
- [Token-saving guide](https://savetokens.tips/guide): practical guide, /clear versus /compact versus new session, caveman mode, agent copy blocks, model routing, subagent economics
- [About](https://savetokens.tips/about): who characterizes the data and how the figures are measured
